description: Validation profile for Attitude-to-Risk (ATR) profiling documents. Governs the rules applied during evidence ingestion for this document type.

rules.description: Document must be readable and not corrupt or password-protected.
Document must bear an adviser signature or electronic equivalent confirming the assessment was conducted.
Assessment date must be within 365 days of the ingestion request date.
A valid risk band must be extractable from the document.
Capacity for loss assessment (low/medium/high) must be explicitly documented per FCA COBS 9.2.
The ATR questionnaire product or version reference must be identifiable.
